topic: Trigger.dev - background job and workflow orchestration platform for TypeScript

sources.title: Trigger.dev Documentation - Main Index
keyInsights: Core documentation structure with tasks, triggering, runs, and API keys as foundational concepts
14+ practical example integrations including video processing, AI generation, and web scraping
Build extensions for Prisma, Python, Playwright, FFmpeg
Realtime API with React hooks for frontend integration

sources.title: Trigger.dev Homepage - Platform Overview
keyInsights: Four-tier pricing: Free ($0), Hobby ($10), Pro ($50), Enterprise (custom)
14,500+ GitHub stars, Apache 2.0 license
Elastic auto-scaling, multi-region workers, static IP availability
Integrates with Next.js, Vercel, AWS, Remix, Bun, Fastify, Express

sources.title: Trigger.dev GitHub Repository
keyInsights: TypeScript 98.4% of codebase, latest release v4.4.3 (March 2026)
7,065 commits, 615 releases, 1.1k forks
Self-hosting via Docker Compose or Kubernetes Helm charts
Checkpoint-resume system for durable execution

sources.title: Tasks Overview - Core Task Definition
keyInsights: Tasks defined with task() function, require unique id and async run function
Return values must be JSON serializable
Lifecycle hooks: onStartAttempt, onWait, onResume, onSuccess, onComplete, onFailure, onCancel
Machine presets from micro (0.25 vCPU) to large-2x (8 vCPU, 16 GB)

sources.title: Triggering Tasks - Execution Methods
keyInsights: tasks.trigger(), batchTrigger(), triggerAndWait(), batchTriggerAndWait()
Type-safe triggering with generic type parameters
Trigger options: delay, ttl, idempotencyKey, debounce, queue, region, machine
Payloads up to 10MB, auto-offloaded to object storage above 512KB

sources.title: Queue Concurrency - Flow Control
keyInsights: Shared queues across tasks, per-tenant isolation with concurrencyKey
Waiting runs do NOT consume concurrency slots
SDK queue management: list, pause, resume, overrideConcurrencyLimit
Subtasks don't inherit parent queue - prevents deadlocks

sources.title: Errors and Retrying - Resilience
keyInsights: Global and task-level retry configuration with exponential backoff
retry.onThrow() for block-level retries, retry.fetch() for HTTP retries
AbortTaskRunError to prevent retries on known failures
catchError callback for conditional retry logic

sources.title: Wait Functions Overview
keyInsights: wait.for(), wait.until(), wait.forToken(), inputStream.wait()
Automatic checkpoint after ~5 seconds of waiting
Zero compute cost during waits
Parent tasks checkpoint when waiting for subtasks

sources.title: Realtime API Overview
keyInsights: Run updates via Electric SQL (HTTP-based PostgreSQL sync, not WebSockets)
Streaming for continuous data like AI tokens
useRealtimeRun and useRealtimeStream React hooks
Subscribe by run ID, tags, batch, or trigger+subscribe combos

sources.title: Runs - Task Execution Lifecycle
keyInsights: 11 run states from PENDING_VERSION to EXPIRED
runs.list(), retrieve(), cancel(), replay(), reschedule()
Idempotency keys prevent duplicate execution
TTL defines max queue wait time before auto-expire

sources.title: Self-Hosting Guide
keyInsights: Minimum 4 CPU cores, 8 GB RAM, Debian OS
Docker Compose single-server or split-services deployment
No ARM support, Docker checkpoint experimental
Magic link auth with Resend/SMTP/AWS SES options

sources.title: Scheduled Tasks (Cron)
keyInsights: Declarative cron via task config, imperative via schedules.create()
Timezone support with automatic DST adjustment
L notation for last day of month/week
externalId for per-user scheduling without redeployment

sources.title: trigger.config.ts Configuration Reference
keyInsights: Runtimes: Node.js 21.7.3 (default), Node.js 22.16.0, Bun 1.3.3
Global lifecycle hooks: onStart, onSuccess, onFailure, init
Telemetry exporters for Axiom, Honeycomb via OTLP
Build extensions: Prisma, syncEnvVars, puppeteer, ffmpeg, python, aptGet

sources.title: Deployment and Environment Variables
keyInsights: CLI deploy and GitHub Actions deployment methods
syncEnvVars build extension for Infisical/Vercel sync
Auto-loads .env files in priority order during dev
Env vars fetched and injected before run begins

sources.title: Machine Presets and Configuration
keyInsights: 7 machine presets from micro to large-2x
Task-level, global default, and runtime override configuration
OOM detection with ResourceMonitor helper class
Auto-retry with larger machine on OOM failures

sources.title: Trigger.dev Pricing Page
keyInsights: Per-second compute billing from $0.0000169/s (micro) to $0.0006800/s (large-2x)
Run invocation fee: $0.000025 per run ($0.25 per 10K)
Free tier: $5 credit, 20 concurrent runs, 10 schedules
Pro tier: $50/mo with $50 credit, 200+ concurrent runs, 30-day logs

sources.title: CLI Deploy Command Reference
keyInsights: Compiles, bundles, deploys, and registers tasks as new version
Supports prod, staging, and preview environments
dry-run, skip-promotion, skip-sync-env-vars options
Self-hosted: TRIGGER_ACCESS_TOKEN and TRIGGER_API_URL required in CI

sources.title: Waitpoint Tokens - Human-in-the-Loop
keyInsights: Create tokens with timeout, idempotency key, and tags
Token provides ID, callback URL, and publicAccessToken
Complete via SDK, HTTP callback, or webhook
Idempotency prevents redundant waits during retries

sources.title: Realtime Architecture Deep Dive
keyInsights: Electric SQL for run updates, dedicated transport for streaming
No polling or WebSockets required
Subscription patterns: run ID, tags, batch, trigger+subscribe
Both features can operate simultaneously

sources.title: React Hooks for Realtime
keyInsights: Trigger hooks, run update hooks, streaming hooks, SWR hooks
Public Access Token authentication required
useRealtimeRun for status/metadata/tags updates
SWR hooks for one-time fetch with caching

sources.title: Realtime Streams - Consuming Data
keyInsights: Defined streams for type safety, direct streams by key, default streams
Timeout, startIndex for reconnection, AbortSignal support
SSE formatting for frontend via ReadableStream
Batch accumulation for database/queue optimization

sources.title: AI Agent Building Guide
keyInsights: Five patterns: prompt chaining, routing, parallelization, orchestrator, evaluator-optimizer
Human-in-the-loop with ReactFlow and waitpoint tokens
Claude, OpenAI, Vercel AI SDK, Mastra framework integrations
Seven example implementations including deep research agent

sources.title: Idempotency Deep Dive
keyInsights: Three scopes: run (default), attempt, global
TTL configuration from seconds to days (default 30 days)
Failed runs auto-clear keys; successful runs retain them
Payload-based deduplication via SHA-256 hashing pattern

sources.title: Tags - Run Organization
keyInsights: Up to 10 tags per run, 1-128 characters each
Add at trigger time or during execution via tags.add()
Tags don't propagate to child runs automatically
Filter in dashboard and via runs.list() SDK

sources.title: Management API Overview
keyInsights: REST API via @trigger.dev/sdk
Configure with secretKey for authentication
Runs, schedules, env vars, queues, waitpoints management
Auto-pagination for list endpoints

sources.title: Next.js Integration Guide
keyInsights: App Router route handlers, Server Actions, Pages Router API routes
syncVercelEnvVars build extension for auto env sync
ISR path revalidation support
Concurrent dev with concurrently package

sources.title: Guides Index - Frameworks and Integrations
keyInsights: Framework guides: Bun, Next.js, Node.js, Remix, SvelteKit
Database: Prisma, Supabase, Sequin
Webhooks: Stripe, Hookdeck, custom
25+ copyable task templates, 18 example projects

sources.title: How Trigger.dev Works - Architecture
keyInsights: CRIU checkpoint captures memory, CPU registers, file descriptors
Checkpoint compresses and stores to disk, releases compute
Same esbuild build system in dev and production
Idempotency keys combined with checkpoint-resume for durable execution

sources.title: Atomic Versioning System
keyInsights: Version format: YYYYMMDD.N
Running tasks locked to their start version
triggerAndWait children inherit parent version, trigger() uses latest
Replays use current code with same inputs for bug fix verification

sources.title: System Limits Reference
keyInsights: API: 1,500 req/min across all tiers
Payload 3MB, output 10MB, offload above 512KB
Pro: 1M queued tasks, 1000+ schedules, 100+ concurrent runs
Max TTL 14 days, batch size 1,000

sources.title: v3 to v4 Migration Guide
keyInsights: v3 shutdown: April 1, 2026 (deploys stop), July 1, 2026 (full shutdown)
Import path change from @trigger.dev/sdk/v3 to @trigger.dev/sdk
Queue() function required instead of on-demand creation
triggerAndWait returns Result objects with .ok/.error/.unwrap()

sources.title: Vercel Integration
keyInsights: Automatic deployment on every Vercel push
Bidirectional env var sync (with sensitive var limitations)
Atomic deploys: gates Vercel until task build completes
Preview environment mapping support

sources.title: GitHub Actions Deployment
keyInsights: Production, staging, and preview branch workflows
TRIGGER_ACCESS_TOKEN secret required
Self-hosted: Docker Buildx + registry credentials needed
Version sync via package.json instead of @latest

sources.title: Logging, Tracing, and Metrics
keyInsights: console.log auto-captured in run logs
Structured logger with debug/log/info/warn/error levels
logger.trace() creates OpenTelemetry spans
All logs visible in dashboard run interface

sources.title: Context Object Reference
keyInsights: Static context values fixed at run start
Includes task, attempt, run, queue, environment, git, org info
Machine specs: preset, CPU, memory, cost rate
Use usage functions for live cost tracking instead of ctx values

sources.title: CLI Dev Command - Local Development
keyInsights: Each task runs in separate Node process
--analyze flag for debugging slow builds
Auto version check, hot reloading on file changes
Concurrent development with framework dev servers

sources.title: Bun Runtime Integration
keyInsights: Tasks run on Bun 1.3.3 in both dev and production
CLI still requires Node.js (Bun CLI not yet supported)
OpenTelemetry instrumentation limited due to missing register hooks
Init with --runtime bun flag

sources.title: Trigger.dev Blog - Technical Insights
keyInsights: Replaced Node.js with Bun for 5x throughput (10,700 req/s vs 2,099 req/s)
TRQL query language for ClickHouse-backed analytics
Multi-tenant SQL access with tenant-safe compilation
Strategic evolution toward AI agents as core competency

sources.title: Dashboard Test Runner
keyInsights: Built-in test interface in dashboard
Configure payload, metadata, machine, queue, delay
Save reusable test templates
Reference and reuse previous test runs

sources.title: Run Usage and Cost Tracking
keyInsights: usage.getCurrent() for real-time cost/duration metrics
usage.measure() isolates resource consumption per code block
Waits and retry gaps not counted in compute cost
runs.retrieve() and runs.list() for retrospective cost analysis

sources.title: LLM Documentation Index - Complete URL Listing
keyInsights: 150+ documentation pages across all categories
Full API endpoint documentation for REST management
30+ example projects covering AI, media, data processing
Migration guides from v3, Mergent, and n8n
